title: Animated Ores
description: Animates Ore Textures to make them more Noticeable
body:
(This does NOT need Mods to work but it is compatible with Sodium and Optifine) This Texture Pack makes an Ore Texture under the Stone rotate to make the Ore more noticeable. ~~It also adds small shadings to make the ore look 3D.~~ I made them actually 3D ~~The Ores do not Glow without Shaders (however I might change this if I update this project to 1.21.9 after it comes out)~~ They glow now. It can get laggy so versions 1.1-1.3 are 2.0 modified to have certain ores not be 3D (They also don't glow if they are not 3D because that's how I made them glow)
![THE ORES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/533eb1df69f052aec4ee462851566a36aa87efeb.gif)

![Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b12637e4064f77ad811c7ae7de2d8a9b49815232.gif)
